name: Winter Hill Gang
description: The Winter Hill Gang was a loose confederation of American organized crime figures based in the Boston area, primarily active from 1961 to 2000. Founded by James 'Buddy' McLean and Howard 'Howie' Winter, it was predominantly Irish-American and involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, gambling, and weapons smuggling. The gang was the second most powerful criminal organization in New England after the Patriarca crime family.
